title: Cashier Logs
subtitle: Daily Validation & Handover
workflow_info_desc: This is the final End-of-Day audit. While shifts are reconciled individually, this page provides a consolidated logical view for the entire business day. Use this to cross-reference physical drawer contents against system-wide payment channel reports before finalizing the day's books.
no_closed_shifts: NO CLOSED SHIFT SESSIONS DETECTED YET
notes_placeholder: Any discrepancies? Special events today? Log them here...
checklist_1: Confirm physical cash in the drawer matches actual count.
checklist_2: Validate EDC settlements against system payment totals.
checklist_4: Submit report to lock today's performance data.
confirm_finalize: Are you sure you want to finalize the reconciliation for
